scope: GSC-only analysis derived from the BCC keyword master list + Search Console snapshots (latest snapshot 2026-06-11; today's fetch did not run because the host runner was not processing the queue, so figures are from the on-disk 2026-06-11 aggregate). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally not auto-generated. Page counts come only from keywords-master.json: 74 keyword entries map to 49 distinct target pages (42 live www URLs, 7 staging-targeted).
wins: Four core commercial terms are holding top-3: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' (#2.0), 'weight loss counseling san antonio' (#2.0), 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' (#2.0) and national 'bariatric surgery counseling' (#2.7, +0.8) - the brand's money keywords are defended.

Best evidenced mover: 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' improved 14.0 -> 10.8 (delta +3.2) on 12 impressions, the strongest gain backed by non-trivial impression volume, and is now knocking on page 1.

'bariatric counseling near me' jumped 29.0 -> 11.7 (delta +17.3) and 'nutritional counseling san antonio tx' rose 31.6 -> 26.3 (+5.3, 10 impressions) - both real upward movement on tracked commercial terms.

Blog content is carrying impression volume at page-1 positions: the hydration post pulls 2,688 impressions at avg #5.7 (12 clicks - the site's main click driver) and the Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound medications post pulls 1,775 impressions at avg #9.4.
Recovery in aggregate position: impression-weighted avg position rebounded from the late-May trough (~24-27) back to ~18.8 across the most recent six snapshots.
needs_attention: Coverage: 25 of 74 tracked KEYWORDS show impressions; 49 show none. This is a KEYWORD count, not a page count - and most staging-targeted tracker URLs (7 of 49 distinct target pages) are most likely stale pointers to pages already live on www (a tracker-hygiene issue, not lost traffic), per the 2026-06-03 sitemap check.

Visibility drift across the window: daily impressions fell from 2,447 (2026-05-07) to 1,706 (2026-06-11), roughly -30%, and impression-weighted avg position softened from 14.87 to 18.84 over the same span (though it recovered off the late-May low).
Near-zero CTR: only 4 clicks on 1,706 impressions in the latest snapshot (~0.2%) - lots of visibility is not converting to clicks.

Commercial terms that slipped with real impressions: 'nutrition counseling' 12.0 -> 69.1 (delta -57.1, 14 impressions), 'weight loss counseling' 48.3 -> 64.7 (-16.3, 6 impr), 'san antonio bariatric center' 14.6 -> 28.3 (-13.7, 9 impr), 'eating disorder treatment san antonio' 27.3 -> 36.0 (-8.7) and 'bariatric counselor' 8.8 -> 16.3 (-7.5).
Caveat: many tracked terms register only 1 impression, so their positions swing day to day and these deltas are directional only, not precise rank changes.
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene first: repoint the 7 staging targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their correct live www URLs so GSC can match them - this likely recovers a chunk of the 49 'no-impression' keywords without any new publishing.

Fix CTR by linking from the high-impression blog posts (hydration 2,688 impr; medications 1,775 impr) into the matching service pages with clear CTAs, converting informational impressions into consultation clicks.
On-page refresh for the slipped commercial terms - prioritize 'nutrition counseling' / 'nutritional counseling san antonio tx', 'san antonio bariatric center' and 'weight loss counseling' - to arr
